name: AsuraComic
warnings: Bespoke single-source parser (NOT a Madara/MangaThemesia theme): a Next.js/Astro site whose browse page is a server-rendered #series-grid reached via GET /browse?page=&search=&genres=&status=&types=&sort=, and whose reader page ships its image list as Next.js flight data — either inline in an astro-island[component-url*='ChapterReader'] props blob, or streamed across many self.__next_f.push([...]) script chunks carrying {order,url} records. Ported to a dedicated AsuraScansEngine; config left empty (all defaults match the base). No JavaScript is executed — the flight payload is parsed as text/JSON.

kotatsu configKeyDomain default is asurascans.com; the live host serving the Astro/Next markup this engine parses is asuracomic.net (asurascans.com 301-redirects there), so domain is set to asuracomic.net and asurascans.com kept as an altDomain. User-overridable at runtime.
Chapters posted within the last 6h are hidden (kotatsu CHAPTER_HIDE_WINDOW_MS), datafied as chapterHideWindowMs.

availableStates {ONGOING, FINISHED, ABANDONED, PAUSED, UPCOMING} and availableContentTypes {MANGA, MANHWA, MANHUA} are engine constants used only for building the browse-filter URL (the SourceEngine contract exposes tags via getAvailableTags but not a getFilterOptions surface).
